title: Minotaur Bodyguard negates battle attack damage

card.rawText: During battle, play this card from your hand. Negate the Atk damage meant for your creature for this battle.

effect.value: All Atk damage from that battle

plan.title: Minotaur Bodyguard negates battle attack damage
plan.summary: Verify lightning response from hand prevents Atk damage to your creature for current battle.

notes: Put Minotaur Bodyguard in player_2 hand. Player_1 attacks player_2 creature.

steps: Declare player_1 creature attacks player_2 creature.
Resolve successful hit and reach damage response window.
Player_2 plays Minotaur Bodyguard from hand as lightning response.
manualVerification: Confirm response window appears only for defending player when Atk damage would hit their creature.
Confirm attack still counts as a hit; only Atk damage is negated.
riskNotes: Runtime support is partial; card-specific condition may fail even if generic prevention works.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate lightning condition, chain resolution, and current-battle cleanup.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
